sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 24

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 24:1
items.html:
(to the question) Gevurot Zecharim [male Gevurot]
If the Gevurot [judgments] are in the discernment of the first three [GaR], they are called male Gevurot; and if they lack the first three, they are called female Gevurot. All the more so when they are not yet in a discernment of Zivug [coupling] at all — then they are called female Gevurot. (p. 759, Item 40)
